mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_submission (task_id, user_id, file_url, file_name, score, feedback, submit_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileName}, NULL, NULL, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, u.nickname as submitterName FROM task_submission s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY s.submit_time DESC

SELECT s.id as submissionId, s.file_url as fileUrl, s.file_name as fileName, s.score, s.feedback, s.submit_time as submitTime, t.title as taskTitle, t.id as taskId FROM task_submission s LEFT JOIN task t ON s.task_id = t.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.submit_time DESC
